description: Returns load-related model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = lmodind(ibus, id ,string1, string2)

parameters.name: string1
parameters.description: String indicating the type of load model desired. (input).

parameters.name: string2
parameters.description: String indicating the load model quantity desired. (input).

return_values.name: ival
return_values.description: Load model array index or status. (output).

string2.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of STATE values used by the model.
Number of VAR values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.
Number of reserved ICON values used by the model.

Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect load status. For a model to be called during simulations the load must be in-service bus type code must be 1 or 2 and the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: Load not in network but in model tables; ‘IVAL’ returned.
Load not in network or in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
No model of type ‘STRING1’ for this load; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
